productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Pre FM trg Black Shorts
description: Composition Black football shorts made of 100% polyster, adidas's signature three stripes along the sides in blue, mesh panels on the sides and back, comfortable elastic waist band with inner drawstring, and brand name and logo printed on the left leg Fitting Regular Washcare Machine wash in cold water below 30 Degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Cool iron Do not iron on prints/trims/logo One look at these black football shorts from adidas will tell you how perfect they are for your matches. The blue stripes running down both sides add that touch of vibrancy to them, while the mesh panels improve ventilation. The waist band is soft; for a more snug Fit you can use the internal drawstring too. Team it with a smart tee and a pair of football studs and get ready to rule the field! Model statistics The model wears trousers, length of 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
